note: Canon asset catalog for the Scourge universe. Entity sprites are PER-GAME renders of shared canon — the variant matrix (issue #6): each entity lists the games it renders in (`games`) and a per-game `variants` path (null until rendered by @shipshitgames/assetgen). The 'shared' section lists truly game-agnostic assets every game uses identically.

entities.name: Swarm Ripper
entities.canon: Fast melee Scourge fodder that floods lanes and breach rooms through numbers and claws.
entities.promptBase: Scourge melee swarm creature with hunched parasite frame, black chitin over raw muscle, blade-like forearms, toxic-green breach cores, wet gore and exposed sinew.

entities.name: Swarm Spitter
entities.canon: Ranged Scourge form that turns infection into projectile pressure via distended toxic sacs or fused arm-lances.
entities.promptBase: Scourge ranged creature with thin predatory silhouette, distended toxic-green firing sac or bio-industrial arm lance, black chitin, raw sinew, rusted tech fragments embedded in flesh.

entities.name: Render
entities.canon: Chitin Warhost melee charger that charges in straight lines with armor-piercing carapace, enraging at half health with exposed toxic-green breach nodes.
entities.promptBase: Scourge elite charger with cracked alien carapace, hunched low-profile silhouette, blade-claw forelimbs, toxic-green parasite nodes at seams, enrage variant shows blood-hot exposed tissue.

entities.name: Graft-Breacher
entities.canon: Machine-Graft siege elite that walks up and shears through fortifications with a massive demolition claw and tendril-burst secondary attack.
entities.promptBase: Scourge elite industrial walker frame overtaken by parasite, black chitin threading through riveted metal joints, one massive demolition-claw fused with bone-sinew, toxic-green breach cores at former control panels, asymmetric tendril mass opposite.

entities.name: Rot-Engine
entities.canon: Machine-Graft ranged siege elite that dissolves fortifications from standoff with a sustained bile-lance, planted and unhittable until the sac is destroyed.
entities.promptBase: Scourge elite siege unit with rusted industrial machine chassis infested by parasite, black chitin over burst metal hull, toxic-green bile sac swollen inside engine cavity, organic tendrils pulsing through joints, hollow breached cockpit.

entities.name: Breach-Boss
entities.canon: Monstrous Scourge expression grown around a breach heart, wielding melee pressure and ranged barrages behind a shield-organ ring.
entities.promptBase: Scourge breach-boss with huge non-human war body, toxic-green chest core, shield-organ ring, fused rusted metal and wet chitin, massive arms, projectile vents.

entities.name: Trucebreaker
entities.canon: Neutral Scourge arena threat in Pactfall that pressures both Pyre and Wardens equally from broken arena wreckage.
entities.promptBase: Neutral Scourge arena boss with parasite mass grown over broken arena metal, toxic-green core, chitin and raw tissue, objective monster silhouette readable from top-down view.

entities.name: Scourge Fighter
entities.canon: Small infected attack craft that flies in arcade formations and mutates pattern behavior as the Starblight run escalates.
entities.promptBase: Scourge infected small attack craft with rusted hull fused with black chitin and raw tissue, toxic-green parasite core, arcade-readable silhouette, dark parasitic growth.

entities.name: Orbital-Breach-Carrier
entities.canon: Starblight orbital boss: a living carrier-ship grown around a breach heart, releasing spore mines and fighter waves while shielding its core.
entities.promptBase: Scourge orbital carrier boss with infected wreckage grown around toxic-green breach heart, chitin plating over rusted ship ribs, spore vents, raw tissue in broken engines, arcade boss silhouette.

entities.name: Ranger
entities.canon: Baseline Pyre Purger operating rifle-first at medium armor and balanced speed for breach descent.
entities.promptBase: Pyre human Purger, medium armor, rifle, scorched gunmetal, bone ceramic, furnace visor, hellfire orange heat lines, high contrast gunmetal and blood

entities.name: Bulwark
entities.canon: Heavy Pyre Purger built to stand in breach pressure longer than anyone, running heavy cannon or shotgun.
entities.promptBase: Pyre heavy Purger, broad slab armor, rotary shotgun or cannon, furnace vents, scorched gunmetal, cracked bone plates, hellfire light

entities.name: Vector
entities.canon: Fast Pyre scout breaching to mark infiltration points and kiting swarms with sensor rig and grapnel.
entities.promptBase: Pyre scout Purger, slim fast armor, compact SMG, breach-marker sensors, scorched black suit, ember visor, blood and rust

entities.name: Patch
entities.canon: Pyre support operator cauterizing field damage faster than breach pressure can inflict it, using injector tubes and heat-seal tools.
entities.promptBase: Pyre support Purger, scorched cauterizer medic rig, injector tubes, bone plates, furnace visor, ember medical heat glow, grimy industrial

entities.name: Pyre Duelist
entities.canon: Arena-tuned Pyre fighter built for sanctioned violence where the Pact is tested but not broken, driving aggressive melee pressure.
entities.promptBase: Pyre arena duelist, light scorched armor, ember blade or carbide weapon, aggressive triangular silhouette, blood and rust, hellfire, sanctioned arena gear

entities.name: Pyre Cauterizer
entities.canon: Pyre arena controller treating every problem as fuel for incineration, running heat tanks and short-range burner weaponry.
entities.promptBase: Pyre Cauterizer, sealed furnace mask, heat tanks and hoses, short-range burner, scorched plates, hellfire heat lines, blood and rust

entities.name: Pyre Interceptor Pilot
entities.canon: Pyre pilot burning Scourge breach matter out of orbit before it can fall into the lanes, flying fast interceptors with burn weapons.
entities.promptBase: Pyre interceptor pilot, sealed scorched flight armor, furnace visor, compact life-support rig, blood-hot warning lamps, hellfire weapons, triangular silhouette

entities.name: Field Engineer
entities.canon: Warden builder who turns broken ground into defendable lanes, deploying tower-control rigs and repair harnesses under fire.
entities.promptBase: Warden field engineer, practical armored technician, square modular plates, tool harness, tower-control rig, gunmetal, industrial yellow, bone stencils, ember hardware

entities.name: Lane Gunner
entities.canon: Warden heavy gunner who wins by staying planted while the Scourge breaks itself against attrition firepower and reinforced stance.
entities.promptBase: Warden lane gunner, heavy stabilized weapon, ammo feed pack, planted stance, gunmetal armor, hazard yellow, ember targeting lamps, square modular silhouette

entities.name: Wallwright
entities.canon: Warden specialist who builds the last wall before a lane becomes a grave, deploying shield emitters and barricade anchors.
entities.promptBase: Warden Wallwright, shield emitter backpack, deployable barricade anchors, slab armor, gunmetal, worn steel, hazard stripes, ember field nodes, gritty industrial

entities.name: Warden Bastion
entities.canon: Warden arena defender who turns a duel into a fortified position, projecting shields inside sanctioned blood-arenas.
entities.promptBase: Warden Bastion, shield projector, square heavy silhouette, gunmetal slab armor, industrial yellow, ember barrier hardware, gritty blood-arena defender

entities.name: Warden Artillerist
entities.canon: Warden ranged hero who brings siege mathematics into sanctioned arena combat with controlled firepower and calculated strikes.
entities.promptBase: Warden Artillerist, shoulder targeting rig, compact artillery launcher, braced stance, gunmetal armor, industrial yellow, ember rangefinder lamps, gritty arena war gear

entities.name: Warden Defense Pilot
entities.canon: Warden pilot protecting orbital infrastructure and shielding the lanes below from Scourge breach incursions and infected craft.
entities.promptBase: Warden defense pilot, reinforced flight suit, shield-control harness, gunmetal plating, industrial yellow, ember shield hardware, practical orbital defender

shared.name: Blood Splatter
shared.note: Gore impact burst (light hits, melee kills). DOOM blood-red #c1121f on dark.

shared.name: Ember Burst
shared.note: Hellfire projectile/impact burst #ff6a00 with fading spark trails.

shared.name: Muzzle Flash
shared.note: Weapon discharge flash, blood-hot red into hellfire orange.

shared.name: Breach Glow
shared.note: Toxic-green #8bdc1f radiant pulse from Scourge breach cores.

shared.name: Pyre Faction Icon
shared.note: Triangular aggressive flame sigil. Blood-red + hellfire orange.

shared.name: Warden Faction Icon
shared.note: Square shield/tower sigil. Gunmetal + bone.

shared.name: Scourge Faction Icon
shared.note: Asymmetrical predatory form with toxic-green breach node. Enemy identity.

shared.name: Breach Event Icon
shared.note: Circular rift with sickly-green corona. Marks breach spawns/danger zones.

shared.name: Lane Marker Icon
shared.note: Directional corridor marker for TD/MOBA lane positions and objectives.

shared.name: Deadlane Title Background
shared.note: Generated medium-chunky pixel-art title screen background, 2026-06-07.

shared.name: Oswald (display)
shared.note: Heavy uppercase military display face (HUD titles, big numbers). DOOM canon.

shared.name: Inter (body)
shared.note: Utilitarian legible body face (flavor text, UI labels).

shared.name: Press Start 2P (pixel display)
shared.note: Pixel title/menu face shared by every game title screen.

shared.name: Breach Collapse SFX
shared.note: ElevenLabs SFX metallic implosion as a breach seals. DOOM-dark, no chime.

shared.name: Choir Whisper Ambience
shared.note: ElevenLabs loopable biotech whisper ambience — Scourge ambient presence.

shared.name: Hellfire Pulse Loop
shared.note: ElevenLabs flame whoomp + ember crackle — Pyre identity audio.

shared.name: Hit Impact SFX
shared.note: ElevenLabs one-shot hit impact promoted over the procedural oscillator cue.

shared.name: Victory: Breach Sealed
shared.note: All-games victory screen music. Runtime WebM/Opus transcode of the user-provided Suno export "Verdict Thunder".
